name: nypd-sergeant-study-guide
description: NYPD Sergeant Promotional Exam study guide with web app and PDF output

scripts.build: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:web:bundle && pnpm run build:pdf
scripts.build:core: pnpm run --filter @nypd-sergeant/core build && cp build/data.json mobile/assets/data/study_data.json && cp -r chapters mobile/assets/data/
scripts.build:web: pnpm run build:core && cp build/data.js apps/web/public/data.js && pnpm run --filter @nypd-sergeant/web build
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:coverage
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build:web && cp apps/web/dist/index.html apps/web/dist/manifest.json apps/web/dist/sw.js apps/web/dist/data.js docs/ && cp build/master-practice-exam.html build/quick-reference-cheat-sheet.html docs/ && rm -f docs/index.html.bak 2>/dev/null; git add docs/ && echo 'Ready to commit: git commit -am "Deploy update" && git push'
scripts.study: npm run export:anki && npm run schedule && open build/study-schedule.md
